think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify and segment every scrimmage play in the video.

**1. Analyze the Request:**
- **Goal:** Segment every scrimmage play.
- **Start Time:** Moment the first defensive player makes visible physical contact with the ball carrier (collision, wrapping, tackle initiation).
- **End Time:** Play action visibly stops (carrier motionless, ball out of bounds, incomplete pass, score confirmed).
- **Special Case:** If no defender contact occurs before the dead ball (e.g., uncontested scores), use the dead ball moment as both start and end, and describe contact as "no_contact_before_dead_ball".
- **Output Format:** JSON.

**2. Scan the Video for Scrimmage Plays:**

*   **Play 1:** 00:06 - 00:15
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, KC 40-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Mahomes throws deep to Rice.
    *   **Contact:** SF #27 (Dre Greenlaw) makes contact with Rice as he catches the ball and is tackled.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 52 yards.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 00:13, play ends around 00:15.

*   **Play 2:** 00:58 - 01:06
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & Goal, KC 9-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Pacheco runs, fumbles.
    *   **Contact:** SF #98 (Javon Hargrave) hits Pacheco, causing the fumble.
    *   **Result:** Turnover (fumble recovered by SF).
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 01:02, play ends around 01:06.

*   **Play 3:** 02:26 - 02:34
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, SF 8-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Purdy bootleg, horse-collar penalty.
    *   **Contact:** KC #32 (Nick Bolton) grabs Purdy's jersey and pulls him down.
    *   **Result:** Penalty (Horse-collar).
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 02:31, play ends around 02:34.

*   **Play 4:** 03:28 - 03:35
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, SF 33-yard line.
    *   **Action:** McCaffrey run.
    *   **Contact:** KC defenders swarm McCaffrey.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 1 yard.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 03:31, play ends around 03:35.

*   **Play 5:** 04:08 - 04:13
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 9, SF 32-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Purdy run.
    *   **Contact:** KC defenders tackle Purdy.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 1 yard.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 04:10, play ends around 04:13.

*   **Play 6:** 04:53 - 05:01
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 3rd & 8, SF 30-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Purdy sacked.
    *   **Contact:** KC #56 (Willie Gay Jr.) and #52 (George Karlaftis) sack Purdy.
    *   **Result:** Loss of 5 yards.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 04:56, play ends around 05:01.

*   **Play 7:** 05:39 - 05:49
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 4th & 13, SF 27-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Punt.
    *   **Contact:** KC #35 (Trent McDuffie) tackles SF #45 (Jake Moody) after the catch.
    *   **Result:** Fair catch/return stopped.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 05:46, play ends around 05:49.

*   **Play 8:** 07:50 - 07:58
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, KC 23-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Mahomes throws incomplete pass.
    *   **Contact:** No contact with ball carrier (incomplete pass).
    *   **Result:** Incomplete.
    *   **Timestamps:** Ball hits ground around 07:56, play ends around 07:58.

*   **Play 9:** 09:28 - 09:34
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 20, KC 10-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Pacheco run.
    *   **Contact:** SF defenders tackle Pacheco.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 6 yards.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 09:31, play ends around 09:34.

*   **Play 10:** 10:01 - 10:08
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 3rd & 16, KC 16-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Mahomes sacked.
    *   **Contact:** SF #55 (Arik Armstead) sacks Mahomes.
    *   **Result:** Loss of 10 yards.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 10:04, play ends around 10:08.

*   **Play 11:** 10:40 - 10:49
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 4th & 18, KC 18-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Punt.
    *   **Contact:** KC #30 (Mike Edwards) tackles SF #20 (Jalen Thompson) after the catch.
    *   **Result:** Return stopped.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 10:46, play ends around 10:49.

*   **Play 12:** 11:41 - 11:47
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, SF 33-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Purdy throws incomplete pass.
    *   **Contact:** No contact with ball carrier (incomplete pass).
    *   **Result:** Incomplete.
    *   **Timestamps:** Ball hits ground around 11:46, play ends around 11:47.

*   **Play 13:** 12:23 - 12:30
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 10, SF 32-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Purdy throws to Samuel.
    *   **Contact:** KC defenders tackle Samuel.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 12 yards.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 12:27, play ends around 12:30.

*   **Play 14:** 13:03 - 13:11
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, SF 48-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Purdy throws to McCaffrey.
    *   **Contact:** KC defenders tackle McCaffrey.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 6 yards.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 13:07, play ends around 13:11.

*   **Play 15:** 13:46 - 13:52
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 4, SF 44-yard line.
    *   **Action:** McCaffrey run.
    *   **Contact:** KC defenders tackle McCaffrey.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 5 yards.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 13:48, play ends around 13:52.

*   **Play 16:** 14:26 - 14:31
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, SF 42-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Mitchell run.
    *   **Contact:** KC defenders tackle Mitchell.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 7 yards.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 14:28, play ends around 14:31.

*   **Play 17:** 15:09 - 15:15
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 3, SF 35-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Mitchell run.
    *   **Contact:** KC defenders tackle Mitchell.
    *   **Result:** Gain of 1 yard.
    *   **Timestamps:** Contact starts around 15:11, play ends around 15:15.

*   **Play 18:** 16:35 - 16:40
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, SF 21-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Purdy throws incomplete pass.
    *   **Contact:** No contact with ball carrier (incomplete pass).
    *   **Result:** Incomplete.
    *   **Timestamps:** Ball hits ground around 16:38, play ends around 16:40.

*   **Play 19:** 17:19 - 17:28
    *   **Context:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 10, SF 20-yard line.
    *   **Action:** Purdy throws to McCaffrey for a touchdown.
    *   **Contact:** No contact before dead ball (touchdown).
    *   **Result:** Touchdown.
    *   **Timestamps:** McCaffrey catches ball and runs into endzone around 17:26, play ends around 17:28.

**3. Construct JSON:**
I will now format these observations into the requested JSON structure.
